guardrails: Keep the default trader path on the file lease until the sanctioned VM dry-run is green and separately promoted.
Do not widen the temporary parallel-runtime exception onto the cloud lease path.
Do not treat the cloud shared execution lease as live from runtime validation alone.

next_step.name: trusted_validation_session
next_step.description: Use the sanctioned VM in an explicitly exclusive paper window for the first broker-audited trusted validation session.
